tables.name: fortune500_companies
tables.description: Fortune 500 company data including financials, rankings, headquarters, and leadership information. Contains 497 companies.

columns.name: assets_m
columns.description: Total assets in millions of US dollars. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '10573.0', '16237.2', '339484.7'.

columns.name: best_companies_to_work_for_boolean
columns.description: Whether the company is on the 'Best Companies to Work For' list. Type: TEXT. Values: '0' (no) or '1' (yes).

columns.name: ceo
columns.description: Full name of the company's Chief Executive Officer. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Stanley M. Bergman', 'Earl C. Austin Jr.', 'Jon Vander Ark'.

columns.name: change_in_rank
columns.description: Change in Fortune 500 ranking compared to previous year. Negative means dropped, positive means gained. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '-8', '52', '33', '5'.

columns.name: company
columns.description: Official name of the company. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Henry Schein', 'Quanta Services', 'Republic Services', 'Home Depot'.

columns.name: company_type
columns.description: Ownership type of the company. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Public' (publicly traded) or 'Private'.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Country where the company is headquartered. Type: TEXT. Primarily 'U.S.'.

columns.name: dropped_in_rank
columns.description: Whether the company dropped in ranking. Type: TEXT. Values: '0' (no) or '1' (yes).

columns.name: founder_is_ceo_boolean
columns.description: Whether the current CEO is also the company founder. Type: TEXT. Values: '0' (no) or '1' (yes).

columns.name: gained_in_rank
columns.description: Whether the company gained in ranking. Type: TEXT. Values: '0' (no) or '1' (yes).

columns.name: global500
columns.description: Whether the company is also on the Global Fortune 500 list. Type: TEXT. Values: '0' (no) or '1' (yes).

columns.name: growth_in_jobs
columns.description: Whether the company experienced growth in number of jobs/employees. Type: TEXT. Values: '0' (no/decline) or '1' (yes/growth).

columns.name: headquarters_city
columns.description: City where the company headquarters is located. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Melville', 'Houston', 'Phoenix', 'Atlanta'.

columns.name: headquarters_state
columns.description: US state where the company headquarters is located. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'New York', 'Texas', 'Arizona', 'Georgia', 'Illinois'.

columns.name: industry
columns.description: Industry classification of the company. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Wholesalers: Health Care', 'Engineering & Construction', 'Waste Management', 'Insurance: Property and Casualty (Mutual)'.

columns.name: is_female_ceo_boolean
columns.description: Whether the CEO is female. Type: TEXT. Values: '0' (no) or '1' (yes).

columns.name: is_profitable_boolean
columns.description: Whether the company is profitable. Type: TEXT. Values: '0' (not profitable/loss) or '1' (profitable).

columns.name: market_cap_march28_m
columns.description: Market capitalization as of March 28 in millions of USD. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Empty for private companies. Examples: '9704.8', '37865.6', '380153.7'.

columns.name: market_cap_updated_m
columns.description: Updated market capitalization in millions of USD. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Empty for private companies.

columns.name: newcomer_to_the_fortune500
columns.description: Whether this is the company's first appearance on the Fortune 500. Type: TEXT. Values: '0' (no) or '1' (yes).

columns.name: number_of_employees_integer
columns.description: Total number of employees. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '25000', '52500', '41000', '463100'.

columns.name: profits_percent_change
columns.description: Year-over-year percentage change in profits. Negative means decline. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '-22.7', '51.6', '16.4'. Empty if not applicable.

columns.name: profits_m
columns.description: Total profits in millions of USD. Negative values indicate losses. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '416.0', '744.7', '-6272.3'.

columns.name: rank_integer
columns.description: Fortune 500 ranking position. Type: TEXT (numeric string). '1' is the highest-ranked. Examples: '333', '192', '276', '39', '23'.

columns.name: revenue_percent_change
columns.description: Year-over-year percentage change in revenue. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '-2.4', '22.3', '10.8', '-3.0'.

columns.name: revenues_m
columns.description: Total revenues in millions of USD. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '12339.0', '20882.2', '152669.0'.

columns.name: sector
columns.description: Broad business sector classification. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Health Care', 'Engineering & Construction', 'Business Services', 'Financials', 'Retailing'.

columns.name: ticker
columns.description: Stock ticker symbol for publicly traded companies. Type: TEXT. Empty for private companies. Examples: 'HSIC', 'PWR', 'RSG', 'HD'.

columns.name: worlds_most_admired_companies
columns.description: Whether the company is on the World's Most Admired Companies list. Type: TEXT. Values: '0' (no) or '1' (yes).
